subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Docker image rollout to production without staging validation violates three critical policies: mandatory 48-hour staging testing (POL-601), change board approval requirement (POL-602), and rollout safety controls (POL-603). All three policies explicitly prohibit this action.
applied_constraints: Staging validation required: minimum 48 hours of testing in non-production environment
Change board approval required before production deployment
Rollout strategy must include automated rollback capability
Traffic monitoring and post-deployment monitoring setup required
